description: Detects ReDoS and resource exhaustion in JavaScript/TypeScript: RegExp constructor with dynamic pattern, regex literals with nested quantifiers, req.on('data') without size limit. Simplified from Rust: flags all new_expression nodes (cannot filter to only RegExp constructor without #match? predicate support, and cannot check if pattern arg is non-literal). All new_expression nodes flagged -- higher false positive rate.

flag.message: new expression detected -- verify this is not new RegExp() with a dynamic (user-controlled) pattern argument
